summary: Tested 4 new features: 1) Create Custom Role - PASS, 2) Delete Custom Role - PASS, 3) Voice-to-text transcription API - PASS, 4) BackButton navigation - PASS. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified role creation dialog, custom role tabs with 'Custom' badge, delete button for custom roles, voice recording button in feedback form, and BackButton using browser history.

ui_bugs.issue: Button text shows 'Record voice message' instead of 'Record voice message (auto-transcribed)' - translation key feedback.recordVoice may not include auto-transcription mention

action_items: Consider updating translation for feedback.recordVoice to include '(auto-transcribed)' hint
critical_code_review_comments: Role creation properly validates: duplicate names, system role names, minimum length
Role deletion checks for users assigned to role before allowing delete
Voice transcription uses OpenAI Whisper via emergentintegrations library
BackButton correctly uses navigate(-1) with window.history.length check for fallback
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test_technician and playwright_test_role custom roles during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features are working correctly. Custom role CRUD is fully functional with proper validation. Voice transcription endpoint accepts audio files and uses Whisper for transcription. BackButton uses browser history with fallback to dashboard.

feature_1_create_custom_role.description: Create Custom Role functionality in Permissions page
feature_1_create_custom_role.details: Dialog opens with role name, display name, description, and base role selector. Role created successfully with permissions copied from base role. New role appears in tabs with 'Custom' badge.

feature_2_delete_custom_role.details: Delete button appears only for custom roles (not system roles). Confirmation dialog shown. Role successfully deleted and removed from tabs.

feature_3_voice_transcription.details: Backend API /api/feedback/transcribe accepts audio files (webm, mp3, wav, etc). Uses OpenAI Whisper via emergentintegrations. Frontend has 'Record voice message' button that triggers auto-transcription after recording stops.

feature_4_backbutton_navigation.details: BackButton component uses navigate(-1) when window.history.length > 2, otherwise falls back to dashboard. Tested navigation from /settings/permissions back to previous page.
